dashboard.title: Finance Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Cash, P/L, receivables, payment calendar, and breakeven KPI in one view.

globalBar.title: Monthly overview
globalBar.asOf: Today is day {{day}} / {{days}} of this month

paymentCalendar.title: {{scope}} payment calendar
paymentCalendar.total: Total due this month {{total}}, remaining from today {{remaining}}

kpi.title: {{scope}} KPI backsolve
kpi.companyBreakeven: Monthly revenue must be ≥ {{amount}} to break even

whatIf.title: Cashflow what-if
whatIf.hint: Choose businesses and new deal counts to see cash and P/L impact.
whatIf.selectCompany: Select a company first to run what-if.

settings.title: Fixed Costs & Opening Balances
settings.hint: Fixed costs drive the payment calendar; opening balances make cash estimates accurate.

empty.noOpeningBalance: Opening balance not set; cash is estimated from ledger only

diplomaCourse.monthHint: Which month this course belongs to

errors.monthTaken: This month is already taken by another course
errors.monthOutOfRange: Month is out of the program's range

englishClass.title: English classes
englishClass.selectHint: Select a class to view enrollments and attendance.

course.selectHint: Select a course to view enrollments.

errors.guarantorRequired: ICA cases require a guarantor name.

caseSubmission.title: Submission timeline
caseSubmission.hint: ICA failures are usually resubmitted after 3 months. Record each submission and rejection time here.

templateStep.title: Template steps
templateStep.selectHint: Select a template to view steps.

stepReview.title: Step review
stepReview.gateHint: Review approval is required before the next step can proceed.

company.title: Company Management
company.createdClockPointPrompt: Company created. You can add clock points now.

employee.title: Employee compensation overrides
employee.selectHint: Select an employee to configure compensation overrides.

performance.title: Performance/KPI
performance.selectEmployeeHint: Select an employee to view KPI targets and performance scores.
performance.overrideHint: Leaving an override empty uses the system auto value; leaving a percentage empty clears that manual override.

clockPoint.title: Clock Point Management
clockPoint.selectLocationRequired: Select latitude and longitude on the map first

attendance.title: Attendance View / Manual Entry
attendance.selectEmployeeHint: Select an employee to view attendance.

clientLibrary.title: Client Library
clientLibrary.selectHint: Select a client to view the library.
clientLibrary.empty: This client has no documents yet

companyFiles.title: Company Files
companyFiles.selectHint: Select a company to view expenses and files.
companyFiles.empty: This company has no files yet

contract.title: Contracts
contract.selectHint: Select a contract to view versions.

errors.category_required: Expense entries require an expense category
errors.fx_rate_required: Non-SGD entries require an FX rate
errors.statement_parse_failed: Could not parse statement lines. Use one line per Date Direction Amount Description.
errors.source_locked: Bridged ledger entries only allow proof, note, and relation changes

bankAccounts.title: Bank Accounts
bankAccounts.subtitle: Maintain company bank accounts and primary accounts.
bankAccounts.required: Company and account name are required

ledger.title: Ledger
ledger.proofRequired: Upload at least one proof file first
ledger.proofMissingHint: Some bridged or historical entries are missing proof. Fill them before audit.

reports.title: Financial Reports
reports.cashBasisHint: Cash basis; accrual adjustments are handled by the accountant; exported data can be mapped to Form C-S / ACRA templates.
reports.byCompany: Net profit before tax by company

reconcile.title: Reconcile
reconcile.importPlaceholder:
One line: 2026-06-01 out 1200 Rent
Comma format also works: 2026-06-01,out,1200,Rent

assignments.title: Business assignments
assignments.selectSales: Select a sales employee to view assignments.

billing.title: Billing
billing.selectHint: Select a billing to view payments and price adjustments.

statement.notFound: Statement not found or link expired

payment.title: Payments
payment.fxRateHint: RMB payments require an FX rate
payment.fxRateRequired: RMB payments require an FX rate

milestones.title: Collection Milestones
milestones.hint: Milestones split one-time revenue into deposit, progress, and final payments.

milestoneSplit.title: Milestone Allocation
milestoneSplit.empty: Please add stages in the Collection Milestones tab first
milestoneSplit.totalWarning: The total is not 100%. Saving will use the percentages currently entered.
milestoneSplit.mixedHint: Percent-based stages should total 100%; fixed-amount stages use that amount directly, and the remaining balance is assigned to the final stage.

preview.title: Demo profit-rate preview
preview.openEndedHint: Some recurring periods are missing months or events, so those open-ended totals are not included.
